mapper.insert: insert into test_instrument (id, `code`, `name`, files_state, model, manufacturer, serial_number, price, appraisal_date, `range`, `level`, used, laboratory_id, old_code, device_admin, use_dept, calibration_param, store_place, calibration_period, expire_date, calibration_number, purchase_date, is_calibration, affirm_way, calibration_corporation, price_per_hour, picture, incorporated_date, type_id, is_port, validity_date, content, check_price, specs, traceability_mode, contract_url, invoice_url, remark, status, del_flag, create_time, update_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{filesState,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{model,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{manufacturer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{serialNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{price,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{appraisalDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{range,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{level,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{used,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{laboratoryId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{oldCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deviceAdmin,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{useDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{calibrationParam,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{storePlace,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{calibrationPeriod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{expireDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{calibrationNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{purchaseDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{isCalibration,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{affirmWay,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{calibrationCorporation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pricePerHour,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{picture,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{incorporatedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{typeId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{isPort,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{validityDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{checkPrice,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{specs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{traceabilityMode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{contractUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{invoiceUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{delFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into test_instrument
id,
code,
name,
files_state,
model,
manufacturer,
serial_number,
price,
appraisal_date,
range,
level,
used,
laboratory_id,
old_code,

content,
check_price,
specs,
traceability_mode,

invoice_url,

mapper.update:
update test_instrument
code = #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
files_state = #{filesState,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
model = #{model,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
manufacturer = #{manufacturer,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
serial_number = #{serialNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
price = #{price,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
appraisal_date = #{appraisalDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
`range` = #{range,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`level` = #{level,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
used = #{used,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
laboratory_id = #{laboratoryId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
old_code = #{oldCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
device_admin = #{deviceAdmin,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
use_dept = #{useDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
calibration_param = #{calibrationParam,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
store_place = #{storePlace,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
calibration_period = #{calibrationPeriod,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
expire_date = #{expireDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
calibration_number = #{calibrationNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
purchase_date = #{purchaseDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
is_calibration = #{isCalibration,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
affirm_way = #{affirmWay,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
calibration_corporation = #{calibrationCorporation,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
price_per_hour = #{pricePerHour,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
picture = #{picture,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
incorporated_date = #{incorporatedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
type_id = #{typeId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
is_port = #{isPort,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
validity_date = #{validityDate,jdbcType=DATE},
content = #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
check_price = #{checkPrice,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
specs = #{specs,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
traceability_mode = #{traceabilityMode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
contract_url = #{contractUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
invoice_url = #{invoiceUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=CHAR},
del_flag = #{delFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update test_instrument set code = #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, files_state = #{filesState,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, model = #{model,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, manufacturer = #{manufacturer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, serial_number = #{serialNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, price = #{price,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, appraisal_date = #{appraisalDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, range = #{range,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, level = #{level,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, used = #{used,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, laboratory_id = #{laboratoryId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, old_code = #{oldCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, device_admin = #{deviceAdmin,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, use_dept = #{useDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, calibration_param = #{calibrationParam,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, store_place = #{storePlace,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, calibration_period = #{calibrationPeriod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, expire_date = #{expireDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, calibration_number = #{calibrationNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, purchase_date = #{purchaseDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, is_calibration = #{isCalibration,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, affirm_way = #{affirmWay,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, calibration_corporation = #{calibrationCorporation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, price_per_hour = #{pricePerHour,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, picture = #{picture,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, incorporated_date = #{incorporatedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, type_id = #{typeId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, is_port = #{isPort,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, validity_date = #{validityDate,jdbcType=DATE}, content = #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, check_price = #{checkPrice,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, specs = #{specs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, traceability_mode = #{traceabilityMode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, contract_url = #{contractUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, invoice_url = #{invoiceUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=CHAR}, del_flag = #{delFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.insert:
insert into test_instrument_a_check (id,old_id, code, `name`, files_state, model, manufacturer, serial_number, price, appraisal_date, `range`, `level`, used, laboratory_id, old_code, device_admin, use_dept, calibration_param, store_place, calibration_period, expire_date, calibration_number, purchase_date, is_calibration, affirm_way, calibration_corporation, price_per_hour, picture, incorporated_date, type_id, is_port, validity_date, content, check_price, specs, traceability_mode, contract_url, invoice_url, remark, status, del_flag, create_time, update_time) values
(#{item.id,jdbcType=INTEGER},#{item.oldId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.filesState,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.model,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.manufacturer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.serialNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.price,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.appraisalDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.range,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.level,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.used,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.laboratoryId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.oldCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.deviceAdmin,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.useDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.calibrationParam,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.storePlace,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.calibrationPeriod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.expireDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.calibrationNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.purchaseDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.isCalibration,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.affirmWay,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.calibrationCorporation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.pricePerHour,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.picture,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.incorporatedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.typeId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.isPort,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.validityDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{item.content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.checkPrice,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.specs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.traceabilityMode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.contractUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.invoiceUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.status,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{item.delFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM test_instrument
and name like CONCAT('%',#{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%')
and code like CONCAT('%',#{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%')
